Record Class SkillsConfig

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Record
net.sylphian.minecraft.skills.config.SkillsConfig
Record Components:
expansions - ordered list of expansion tiers, oldest first
levelUp - effects shown when a player gains a level
public record SkillsConfig(List<SkillsConfig.ExpansionConfig> expansions, SkillsConfig.LevelUpConfig levelUp) extends Record
Immutable snapshot of Sylphian-Skills configuration.

Levels are split across one or more SkillsConfig.ExpansionConfig tiers. Each tier defines its own level count and XP curve. XP within a tier is calculated relative to the start of that tier, so tiers are independently scalable.

Parse via from(FileConfiguration, Logger). Services hold a reference to this holder and read through it; swap the reference on reload.

    static final record

  • Constructor Details

    • SkillsConfig

      public SkillsConfig(List<SkillsConfig.ExpansionConfig> expansions, SkillsConfig.LevelUpConfig levelUp)
      Creates an instance of a SkillsConfig record class.
      Parameters:
      expansions - the value for the expansions record component
      levelUp - the value for the levelUp record component

  • Method Details

    • from

      public static SkillsConfig from(org.bukkit.configuration.file.FileConfiguration config, Logger logger)
      Parses a SkillsConfig from the plugin's config.yml. Every key has a safe default so a missing or malformed entry never aborts startup.
      Parameters:
      config - the loaded file configuration
      logger - used to warn on invalid values
      Returns:
      the parsed config snapshot

    • levelCap

      public int levelCap()
      Returns:
      the total level cap across all expansions

    • currentExpansion

      public SkillsConfig.ExpansionConfig currentExpansion()
      Returns:
      the most recently added expansion, i.e. the active content tier

    • expansionForLevel

      public SkillsConfig.ExpansionConfig expansionForLevel(int globalLevel)
      Returns the expansion tier that the given global level falls within.
      Parameters:
      globalLevel - the global level (1-based)
      Returns:
      the owning expansion tier

    • xpForLevel

      public long xpForLevel(int globalLevel)
      Returns the total accumulated XP required to reach a global level. XP within each tier is calculated relative to the start of that tier.
      Parameters:
      globalLevel - the target level (1-based)
      Returns:
      total XP required, or 0 for level 0

    • levelFromXp

      public int levelFromXp(long xp)
      Derives the current global level from a total accumulated XP value. Result is capped at levelCap().
      Parameters:
      xp - total accumulated XP
      Returns:
      current global level (0 if no XP)

    • xpToNextLevel

      public long xpToNextLevel(long currentXp)
      Returns XP still needed to reach the next level from the given total. Returns 0 if the player is at the level cap.
      Parameters:
      currentXp - the player's current total XP in this skill
      Returns:
      XP remaining until the next level, or 0 at cap

    • toString

      public final String toString()
      Returns a string representation of this record class. The representation contains the name of the class, followed by the name and value of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      toString in class Record
      Returns:
      a string representation of this object

    • hashCode

      public final int hashCode()
      Returns a hash code value for this object. The value is derived from the hash code of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      hashCode in class Record
      Returns:
      a hash code value for this object

    • equals

      public final boolean equals(Object o)
      Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one. The objects are equal if the other object is of the same class and if all the record components are equal. All components in this record class are compared with Objects::equals(Object,Object).
      Specified by:
      equals in class Record
      Parameters:
      o - the object with which to compare
      Returns:
      true if this object is the same as the o argument; false otherwise.

    • expansions

      public List<SkillsConfig.ExpansionConfig> expansions()
      Returns the value of the expansions record component.
      Returns:
      the value of the expansions record component

    • levelUp

      public SkillsConfig.LevelUpConfig levelUp()
      Returns the value of the levelUp record component.
      Returns:
      the value of the levelUp record component
